titleStmt.title: SII 27.426: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 426. (A.R. No. 561 of 1929-30.) HATTIYAṄGAḌI, COONDAPOOR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in prākāra of the Lokanāthēśvara temple.

This is dated the cyclic year Bahudhānya, Bhādrapada ba. 8. It is engraved below No. 427 below and is in characters of the 16th century. Hence the date may be 1578 A.D., August 25. But the details given are insufficient for verification.
It records gift of land in Haṭiya-aṅgaḍi in Hārunāḍa-sīme, belonging to the palace, to god Lōkanātha of the place by Baṁkiyarasa alias Honneya Kaṁbaḷi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
bahudhānya saṁvatsarada bhādrapada bahuḷa 8 lu śrīmatu haṭiṁagaḍiya lōkanāta dēvara
bhaṁ ḍarake baṁkiyarasarāda hoṁneya kaṁbaḷiyara voḍavaṭu darṁma sādhanada biṁnavattaḷeya vakha
ṇeya kramavetteṁdare naṁma hārunāḍa sīmeya haṭiya Agaṁḍiyalu Aramane guḍe cattusīme vi
vara mūḍalu yelusavadana gaḍiyiṁda paḍuvalu teṁkalu lōkanātha dēvara dēvasada gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu
paḍuvalu karuccara baḷiyavara bakiṭṭiti gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu Aṁbaḷiyavara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ
teṁkalu yiṁtī nālku gaḍiyiṁdoḷage Aramaneya hakkala guḍeyanu dēvara dēvasvake dhāreya neradu ko
ṭeU yi taḷavanu Agumāḍi kūḷacittaisudi sārrava mānyetaḷavanukoṭa dhārmmasādanada binnavataḷi
ya paṭi yittappudakke sakṣigaḷu Āditya caṁdraru . baṁkkiyarasara voppu .
Digital edition of SII 27.426 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
